creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text: This PR lack many valuable technical details. If the problem is really in netgraph, please you describe used nodes and their hooks and settings because just notice of some "jng" (whatever it is) not enough. Plain ng0 is p2p-interface and vlan is not. You should also supply any additional details that may be relevand and do not forget to show output of "ngctl list" when jail is up and running, before is panices kernel at shutdown.
